data.title: Add RED structural tests for --auto flag behavior to test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
data.description:
Add 3 structural-boundary test functions (patterns verified absent from current SKILL.md via grep → all 0):

test_auto_flag_support: greps '--auto' (0 in current SKILL.md)
test_auto_recommended_defaults: greps 'recommend.*default' (0 in current SKILL.md)
test_auto_graceful_missing: greps 'actionable.*error' (0 in current SKILL.md)

Insertion: before print_summary, after last existing call.
Header: run 'grep -c "^test_.*().*{" tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh', update to live_count+3.
.test-index: append 3 standalone RED-marker lines (not modifying coverage-map entries):
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_flag_support]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_recommended_defaults]
  plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_graceful_missing]

testing_mode: UPDATE
Files: tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh, .test-index
